title: Filter values of a status from another board

posts.author: GiCa (Gisèle Casabianca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !

I would like to link 2 status column.

Say you have a column A for the activity type (Projects, Trainings, etc) and a colum B for the activity (Projects 1, 2, 3, training in topic aa, bb, cc).
It would be great that once the status A is choosen, only the status related in column B appear.
For example, if I choose Projects in column A, I have only in column B a projects list.

And if I have a board with all the projects and the businesses they’re related to, would it be possible to use it in the other boards for those status columns ?
IT would have only their projects, Marketing, also, etc.

posts.author: Hernan (Hernan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Gisèle

There is no solution for this problem out-of-the-box. Hence, I’m thinking of creating an app to address this issue and additionally to the dynamic filter you described it will also allow static filters added, e.g. Status in not Cancelled AND Group == Active

My question to you: would it be valuable enough for your company to justify paying 10$/month subscription?

Thank you in advance!
